titleStmt.title: SII 38.27: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 27. (A.R. No. 27 of 1912.) TIRUCHCHENDŪR, TIRUCHCHENDUR TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT. On the pillar set up in the second prākāra, Subrahmaṇya temple.

p.hi: King: Vikrama Pāṇḍya Year 2+11, Mituna śu. di. 7, Saturday, Sōdi, 1263 A.D.

summary.p: In characters of the 14th century A.D. This inscription records the gift of 2 mā of land as sarvamāṉya with boundaries defined, in Maṅgalakuruchīpaṟṟu in Tiruvaḻudivaḷanāḍu, exempted from taxes, granted to Attagirinātha Bhaṭṭaṉ of Cheṭṭalūr, who belonged to Harita-gōtra and Āpasthambha-sūtrā, one of the Bhaṭṭars of Parākramapāṇḍya-chaturvēḍimaṅgalam in Karuṅkuḍi-nāḍu. It is also stated that this grant was to take place from the rainy season of the year 12 (of the king). One Virandhākaruvuḍaiyāṉ Eṉṉaipeṟṟaperumāḷ figures as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī komāṟavammarā

koṇṭāṉ śrī vikki
ṟamapāṇṭiya teva
ṟku Iyāṇṭu 2vatu ṉ

ṟup pūṟuvapakṣattu sa
ttamiyum canik kiḻamaiyu

ṅkuṭināṭṭup parākki
rama pāṇṭiyaccatu
rvetimaṅkalattup paṭ

nāta paṭṭaṉukkut tiruva
ḻutivaḷanāṭṭu maṅkala

Ūril Aḷaviṉ paṭiyi
le Iraṇṭu mā nilam

tta naṭuviṟ kaṭṭaḷai

yāṉ Eṉṉaip pe
